summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No GitHub mutations are planned. The hydrated artifact shows this is not a dedupe cluster, has no shared canonical, and has low-signal closeout, merge, fix, and raise_pr disabled. Hydrated open PRs are kept as independent inventory items; already-closed PRs are skipped; refs missing from the preflight artifact need human review because live state and target_updated_at are unavailable.
